description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant, custom design themed around the game Genshin Impact, with colorful character artwork and scenic landscapes covering its surfaces. The front panel displays a large screen set into the upper half, flanked by a control panel with two red joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting support for two players. The marquee at the top showcases prominent Genshin Impact characters and the game's logo, while the lower front panel continues the fantasy landscape and character motif. Both side panels are adorned with detailed, high-resolution graphics depicting in-game environments, including autumnal trees, mountains, and fantasy architecture. The cabinet is constructed in a classic upright style, with a sturdy rectangular base and a slightly angled control panel for ergonomic play. The overall finish is glossy, enhancing the vividness of the printed artwork and giving the cabinet a polished, professional appearance.
description: A glossy, upright arcade game cabinet decorated with Genshin Impact artwork, featuring a large screen, dual joysticks, and vibrant side panel graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee with Genshin Impact characters, the main screen, and the control panel with two joysticks and multiple buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the scenic landscape artwork with water, trees, and distant mountains, and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous landscape scene with a fantasy building and trees, with no visible controls or screen.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring more landscape artwork with autumnal trees and mountains, and a partial view of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen is flat, medium-sized, with a visible bezel, but display technology is not clearly identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a simple, uncluttered layout.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features Genshin Impact characters and logo in a vibrant, anime-inspired style with blue, white, and purple tones.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are covered with high-resolution, colorful graphics depicting fantasy landscapes, autumnal trees, and in-game architecture from Genshin Impact.
